title: Workhorse Group (WKHS) Reports Q1 Loss, Lags Revenue Estimates
text: Workhorse Group reported Q1 2024 earnings with revenue of $1.4 million, down from $1.7 million in the same period of the previous year. Cost of sales increased to $7.4 million from $5.3 million in the same period last year. The company reported a net loss of $29.2 million, up from $25 million a year ago. Earnings per share came in at a loss of $0.10 versus the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of $0.08, compared to a loss of $0.15 per share a year ago. Despite the challenging financial results, Workhorse Group received substantial orders for both W56 and W4 CC trucks. The company secured $15 million in gross proceeds from a financing agreement and implemented cost reductions.
